testcase.name: test_07_cash_register_summary_for_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 when shift exists, got 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_shift_management_iter159.py:210: in test_07_cash_register_summary_for_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 when shift exists, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 when shift exists, got 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_01_super_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Super admin login failed assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_shift_management_iter159.py:246: in test_01_super_admin_login assert user is not None, "Super admin login failed" E AssertionError: Super admin login failed E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_02_super_admin_cashiers_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Super admin login failed assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_shift_management_iter159.py:253: in test_02_super_admin_cashiers_list assert user is not None, "Super admin login failed" E AssertionError: Super admin login failed E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_01_shifts_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_shift_management_iter159.py:289: in test_01_shifts_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
